---
title: "Alethea Duke Bond"
---

## Alethea Duke Bond

**Dates:** (3 Nov 1817-18 Feb 1847)

**Maiden name:** (Yonge)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Daughter of the Rev. Duke Yonge, Vicar of Antony she married Major Edward Bond.

### Letters

- Letter from April 19th  [1845[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from 25 September 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
